/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/bench_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/dataset_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/checksum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/edit_oracle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/affine_oracle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/oracle_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/leap_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/edlib_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/lv89_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/miniwfa_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/ksw2_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/parasail_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_align.dir/src/wrappers/wfa2_wrapper.cpp.o -o bench_align  libbench_edlib.a libbench_lv89.a libbench_miniwfa.a libbench_ksw2.a libbench_leap.a wfa2-build/libwfa2cpp.a -lm wfa2-build/libwfa2.a
